originalTitle: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
summary: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
content: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
chineseTitle: 德国救援失败后，鲸鱼将被从丹麦岛上移走
chineseSummary: 丹麦官员将对这头鲸鱼进行尸检，这头鲸鱼是两周前从驳船上被释放到海里的。
chineseContent: 丹麦官员将对这头鲸鱼进行尸检，这头鲸鱼是两周前从驳船上被释放到海里的。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
